scenarios.name: Convert meters to feet with positive integer input
scenarios.description: User selects 'Length' category, chooses 'Meters' as source unit and 'Feet' as target unit, enters '10', and views the converted result.

scenarios.name: Convert Celsius to Fahrenheit with negative decimal input
scenarios.description: User navigates to temperature category, selects 'Celsius' → 'Fahrenheit', enters '-40.5', and checks the result.

scenarios.name: Convert kilograms to pounds with zero input
scenarios.description: User selects 'Weight' category, sets 'Kilograms' → 'Pounds', and inputs '0'.

scenarios.name: Convert miles to kilometers with large number input
scenarios.description: User chooses 'Length', selects 'Miles' → 'Kilometers', and enters '999999'.

scenarios.name: Attempt conversion with invalid non-numeric input
scenarios.description: User selects 'Length', 'Inches' → 'Centimeters', and types 'abc' into the input field.

scenarios.name: Convert grams to ounces with very small decimal
scenarios.description: User selects 'Weight', 'Grams' → 'Ounces', and enters '0.001'.

scenarios.name: Switch target unit mid-session and re-calculate
scenarios.description: User converts '25' from 'Celsius' to 'Kelvin', then changes target unit to 'Fahrenheit' without re-entering value.

extra-info.value: source_unit: Celsius, initial_target: Kelvin, new_target: Fahrenheit, input_value: 25

scenarios.name: Empty input conversion attempt
scenarios.description: User selects 'Length', 'Kilometers' → 'Miles', but leaves input field blank and triggers conversion.

scenarios.name: Enable a previously hidden unit in Length category
scenarios.description: User navigates to the Length category settings, locates the disabled 'furlong' unit, and toggles it back on.

extra-info.value: Category: Length; Unit: furlong; State before: disabled

scenarios.name: Disable a unit in Temperature category and confirm removal from conversion UI
scenarios.description: User opens Temperature category settings, disables 'Rankine', saves changes, then starts a new temperature conversion.

extra-info.value: Category: Temperature; Unit: Rankine; State before: enabled

scenarios.name: Persist unit visibility settings across app restart
scenarios.description: User disables 'carat' under Mass, exits the app completely, relaunches, and checks Mass unit list.

extra-info.value: Category: Mass; Unit: carat; State before: enabled

scenarios.name: Disable all units in a category and verify empty unit list
scenarios.description: User disables every unit under Area (e.g., acre, hectare, square mile), saves, then opens Area conversion.

extra-info.value: Category: Area; Units disabled: acre, hectare, square mile, square yard, square foot, square inch, km², m², cm², mm²

scenarios.name: Toggle visibility of multiple units across different categories simultaneously
scenarios.description: User disables 'nautical mile' (Length), enables 'BTU' (Energy), and disables 'bar' (Pressure) in one settings session, then saves.

extra-info.value: Categories: Length, Energy, Pressure; Units: nautical mile (disable), BTU (enable), bar (disable)

scenarios.name: Re-enable a unit after clearing app data and reopening
scenarios.description: User clears app data, launches app, configures unit preferences, disables 'peck' under Volume, then re-enables it later.

extra-info.value: Category: Volume; Unit: peck; App state: fresh install / data cleared

scenarios.name: Select and reorder properties to display on main interface
scenarios.description: User accesses display settings, enables 'Conversion History' and 'Favorite Units', disables 'Recent Categories', and drags 'Favorite Units' above 'Conversion History'.

scenarios.name: Disable all properties and confirm empty main interface
scenarios.description: User navigates to display settings and turns off visibility for all available properties (e.g., Conversion History, Favorite Units, Recent Categories).

scenarios.name: Reorder properties using drag-and-drop and verify persistence
scenarios.description: User enables 'Recent Categories', 'Conversion History', and 'Favorite Units', then reorders them as: 'Recent Categories' → 'Favorite Units' → 'Conversion History'.

scenarios.name: Enable single property and verify isolated display
scenarios.description: User disables all properties except 'Recent Categories' in display settings.

scenarios.name: Toggle property visibility mid-session and observe immediate UI update
scenarios.description: While on the main screen, user opens display settings, unchecks 'Conversion History', saves, and returns to main screen without restarting the app.

scenarios.name: Enter valid positive decimal number
scenarios.description: User enters a legitimate positive decimal value (e.g., '123.45') into the numeric conversion input field.

scenarios.name: Enter valid negative integer
scenarios.description: User enters a negative whole number (e.g., '-789') into the numeric conversion field.

scenarios.name: Enter invalid alphabetic characters
scenarios.description: User types letters (e.g., 'abc') into the numeric conversion field.

scenarios.name: Enter mixed invalid symbols
scenarios.description: User enters symbols like '@#$', '12a3!', or '5.6.7' into the numeric field.

scenarios.name: Submit empty input
scenarios.description: User taps convert button without entering any characters in the numeric field.

scenarios.name: Submit whitespace-only input
scenarios.description: User enters only spaces, tabs, or newlines (e.g., '   ') and attempts conversion.

scenarios.name: Enter single decimal point
scenarios.description: User types only '.' into the numeric field.

scenarios.name: Enter standalone minus sign
scenarios.description: User types only '-' into the numeric field.

scenarios.name: Enter number with trailing decimal (e.g., '42.')
scenarios.description: User enters a whole number followed by a decimal point but no fractional digits.

scenarios.name: Paste invalid clipboard content
scenarios.description: User pastes non-numeric text (e.g., 'N/A', '—', or '∞') into the numeric field.

scenarios.name: Settings retained after app restart
scenarios.description: Verifies that all user-configured settings (unit visibility, display order, currency) remain unchanged after closing and reopening the app.

extra-info.value: Unit visibility: Temperature, Length; Display order: Amount, Currency, Unit; Currency preference: USD

scenarios.name: Currency preference persists after device reboot
scenarios.description: Checks whether the selected default currency remains saved after a full device restart.

scenarios.name: Hidden units remain hidden after session restore
scenarios.description: Ensures units explicitly disabled by the user (e.g., 'Pressure', 'Data') stay hidden across app sessions.

scenarios.name: Custom display order preserved after update
scenarios.description: Validates that user-defined display property ordering (e.g., 'Unit → Amount → Currency') survives an app update and subsequent launch.

scenarios.name: Settings intact after force stop and relaunch
scenarios.description: Tests persistence when the app is force-stopped via system settings and then reopened.

extra-info.value: Enabled units: Length, Mass, Time; Default currency: JPY; Display order: Currency, Amount

scenarios.name: Empty or reset settings not applied on first launch
scenarios.description: Confirms that no default or fallback values override user settings—even if internal storage is initially empty or corrupted.
